subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-11-30
subcodes.first_line: I am most grateful for your services; in truth you have served me. You have extended hospitality.
subcodes.first_line_orig: من از خدمات شماها بسیار ممنونم فی الحقیقه مرا خدمت کردید مهمان نوازی نمودید
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @hospitality
